name: Tim Kaine
subject: Drop the attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

Last month marked the 44th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , the landmark law that gave American women the right to seek the health care they need without undue interference from their government.

But under the current White House and Congress, women's health is more endangered than at any point since the _Roe_ decision. One of the first orders signed by President Trump was to enact and expand the Global Gag Rule, which prohibits health organizations that receive U.S. aid from even _discussing_ the full range of reproductive health choices.

But I don't expect Republicans to stop there. **American women are the next target of their dangerous and backwards agenda.**

**[Will you join me in telling the GOP to drop their attacks on reproductive health?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=oRFa%2B9dL1jIC4q8RZauKMcNxuG%2Bhlguq)**

The Affordable Care Act has been a success for many reasons, among them the requirement that health insurance plans include contraception coverage. Expanding access to contraception not only lowers the rate of unintended pregnancies, it gives women control over their own bodies.

**I think Virginians have enough to worry about without the government coming in and legislating their reproductive decisions. So I intend to continue defending women 's rights to make their own health and family planning decisions without interference.**

I'm calling on Republicans to join me. **[Add your name to join me in telling the GOP to drop their attacks on reproductive health and start doing good for American women.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=YU8RUKYZsf2V1o%2B2P4w%2BMMNxuG%2Bhlguq)**

Thanks,

Tim
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ArQbeses%2BaT57XA%2Bjn%2FtQpQkFHKsiwN6)
---
| Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=C5ZB6EqdJAjuoeVPRjVOK8NxuG%2Bhlguq).
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

Wade , the landmark law that gave American women the right to seek the health care they need without undue interference from their government. But under the current White House and Congress, women's health is more endangered than at any point since the Roe decision. One of the first orders signed by President Trump was to enact and expand the Global Gag Rule, which prohibits health organizations that receive U.S. aid from even discussing the full range of reproductive health choices. But I don't expect Republicans to stop there. American women are the next target of their dangerous and backwards agenda. The Affordable Care Act has been a success for many reasons, among them the requirement that health insurance plans include contraception coverage. Expanding access to contraception not only lowers the rate of unintended pregnancies, it gives women control over their own bodies. I think Virginians have enough to worry about without the government coming in and legislating their reproductive decisions. So I intend to continue defending women 's rights to make their own health and family planning decisions without interference. I'm calling on Republicans to join me. Thanks, Tim | | Paid for by Kaine for Virginia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Donna Brazile
subject: Add your name to be first to know who the next DNC Chair is
body:
Stay in the loop.
---
**Be the first to know who the next DNC Chair will be.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Be-the-First-to-Know1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170221_db_nd&source=em_20170221_db_nd")**
Friend --

I want to thank you for standing with us and being on the front lines of our Democratic resistance as we head into a challenging next few years.

This is a president and a political time unlike any we've seen, but I'll tell you one thing for certain: my faith in our party remains unshaken. For the past few months, I've had the pleasure of getting to know our candidates to be the next Chair of the Democratic National Committee, and no matter who wins on Saturday, I know we're going to be in good hands. **[Sign up now to be the first to find out who our next Chair will be -- and then let's help them hit the ground running.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Be-the-First-to-Know1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Sign+up+now+to+be+the+first+to+find+out+&utm_campaign=em_20170221_db_nd&source=em_20170221_db_nd")**

Starting first thing next Monday morning, our new Chair is going to roll up their sleeves and get to work on making our party everything we know it can be in 2017 and beyond.

**I'm excited to support them, and I hope you are, too. Add your name and we'll make sure you get the news as soon as we have it:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Be-the-First-to-Know1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170221_db_nd&source=em_20170221_db_nd")**
Thanks for everything,

Donna

Donna Brazile
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c532/4067b0a/2c9f45f3e/7e7d6c27/1836051926/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170221_db_nd&source=em_20170221_db_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c532/4067b0a/2c9f45f3e/7e7d6c24/1836051926/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170221_db_nd&source=em_20170221_db_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c532/4067b0a/2c9f45f3e/7e7d6c25/1836051926/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170221_db_nd&source=em_20170221_db_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c532/4067b0a/2c9f45f3e/7e7d6c22/1836051926/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170221_db_nd&source=em_20170221_db_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Americans For Prosperity
subject: Say NO to the Border Tax.
body:
| | [Web Version](http://view.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=d632aa46393132697189882adb126bcecfbac4f2e8ec9331d85168a84d7cbc90f480d99918207d8fa64b3bc3a500e480d2647b73c7b4dd32f39596adc66dd0174ad0cae1f82055ad)
---
| | | | [ ](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=02f32999e8b905fbb626237ed2eca6b51017936b6832af9b7c9c240146c5760753c3c71a73a3f6a44b509c1943096f528efb233afaac7858 "https://americansforprosperity.org/")
---
| | | | |
---
| | Peter, 2017 is off to a promising start: Congress is rolling back burdensome regulations put into place by the Obama administration; they've also begun the work on repealing Obamacare; and we've supported strong leaders who have been confirmed to lead the Department of Education and the EPA. Congress is even working on a major tax reform plan! But there's a big problem: Some members of Congress want consumers to shoulder over a trillion dollars in new taxes to pay for special tax benefits for a few big companies that do business overseas. They call it the border adjustment tax, but it is really nothing more than a trillion-dollar tax on the American consumer. [**Watch this video** ](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=02f32999e8b905fb43cdd3710f6dceb4db0c66c5fa4e41b6e3099e4accfa982838889bf145123dca082c371ac6ecf8b0458962b5a48c0a04 "Watch this video") to see why we're asking Congress to abandon the border adjustment tax and instead pursue comprehensive tax reform that lowers taxes for everyone. Share it with your friends so that they understand that this would raise the cost of living for every American - this is a big deal, and we're going to fight it tooth and nail on behalf of ordinary Americans! [](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=02f32999e8b905fb325c7e16df2b22e58951518d355250508968296c4c4941a709912549b3d08e8ef8fe772f6d065911dcdaa1587ed305e0) [](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=02f32999e8b905fb1b1e1a6b4e180aa45b91f1033f5741f5aa2a0dd24bdb80b9088bf717e4a189066213f13e28b987b68073fcef88195d39) Ready to kill this massive tax? Call [(202) 224-3121]( "\(202\) 224-3121") and tell your Congressman to scrap the border tax idea. It's time for them to keep their promise and pursue tax reform that will create economic growth for all Americans! Sincerely,Americans for Prosperity
---
| |

---
| |

---
| |

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
We respect your right to privacy - [view our policy](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=02f32999e8b905fba73c67e8a4b59bc7c4899feed0ec0123ab793391ebc2bf95cbafa9d49a2a40c2fef248e0eb8486c8595467f9ed929119)
Americans For Prosperity 1310 N. Courthouse Road, Suite 700 Arlington, VA 22201
[Update Profile and Subscription Preferences](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c7
54b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=
003i00000262AbVAAU) | [One-Click Unsubscribe](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c7
54b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=
003i00000262AbVAAU)
---

Congress is even working on a major tax reform plan! But there's a big problem: Some members of Congress want consumers to shoulder over a trillion dollars in new taxes to pay for special tax benefits for a few big companies that do business overseas. They call it the border adjustment tax, but it is really nothing more than a trillion-dollar tax on the American consumer. "Watch this video" to see why we're asking Congress to abandon the border adjustment tax and instead pursue comprehensive tax reform that lowers taxes for everyone. Share it with your friends so that they understand that this would raise the cost of living for every American - this is a big deal, and we're going to fight it tooth and nail on behalf of ordinary Americans! Ready to kill this massive tax? Call "\(202\ 224-3121") and tell your Congressman to scrap the border tax idea. It's time for them to keep their promise and pursue tax reform that will create economic growth for all Americans! Sincerely,Americans for Prosperity | | | | | |

name: Democrats.org
subject: ✈️️ We’ll fly you to Atlanta to meet the new DNC Chair ✈️️
body:
You could meet the next Chair of the DNC! **Pitch in $3 or more right now, and you'll be automatically entered for a chance to meet the next Chair of the DNC in Atlanta this weekend!

**[ENTER NOW](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c546/4067b0a/2c9a83b06/7e7d32d1/2785021886/VEsH/ "http://my.democrats.org/Meet-the-Next-DNC-Chair-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ENTER+NOW&utm_campaign=em_20170221_dnc_nd&source=em_20170221_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170221_dnc_nd")****
[](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c546/4067b0a/2c9a83b06/7e7d32de/2785021886/VEsE/ "http://my.democrats.org/Meet-the-Next-DNC-Chair-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20170221_dnc_nd&source=em_20170221_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170221_dnc_nd") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c546/4067b0a/2c9a83b06/7e7d32df/2785021886/VEsF/ "http://my.democrats.org/Meet-the-Next-DNC-Chair-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em_20170221_dnc_nd&source=em_20170221_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170221_dnc_nd")
**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and you'll be automatically entered to win.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c546/4067b0a/2c9a83b06/7e7d32dc/2785021886/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/meet-the-next-chair?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170221_dnc_nd&source=em_20170221_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170221_dnc_nd")

[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c546/4067b0a/2c9a83b06/7e7d32d9/2785021886/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/Meet-the-Next-DNC-Chair-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170221_dnc_nd&source=em_20170221_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170221_dnc_nd")
**

---

No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win. Contributing will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by 2/22/17. [Enter by contributing here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c546/4067b0a/2c9a83b06/7e7d32e6/2785021886/VEsHBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/meet-the-next-dnc-chair?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+Enter+by+contributing+here&utm_campaign=em_20170221_dnc_nd&source=em_20170221_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170221_dnc_nd"), or click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c546/4067b0a/2c9a83b06/7e7d32e7/2785021886/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/next-chair-contest-signup?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170221_dnc_nd&source=em_20170221_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170221_dnc_nd") to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Atlanta, GA; two (2) nights' hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; the opportunity for winner and winner's guest to attend portions of the DNC Winter Meeting on 2/24-25/17 (approximate retail value of all prizes $3,500). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c546/4067b0a/2c9a83b06/7e7d32e4/2785021886/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/next-chair-contest-rules?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+Official+Rules&utm_campaign=em_20170221_dnc_nd&source=em_20170221_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170221_dnc_nd") and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003.

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c546/4067b0a/2c9a83b06/7e7d32e5/2785021886/VEsHBg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170221_dnc_nd&source=em_20170221_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170221_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c546/4067b0a/2c9a83b06/7e7d32e2/2785021886/VEsHAQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170221_dnc_nd&source=em_20170221_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170221_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c546/4067b0a/2c9a83b06/7e7d32e3/2785021886/VEsHAA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170221_dnc_nd&source=em_20170221_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170221_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c546/4067b0a/2c9a83b06/7e7d32e0/2785021886/VEsHAw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=16+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170221_dnc_nd&source=em_20170221_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170221_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Democrats.org
subject: 🍑 Be there in Atlanta when we elect our next DNC Chair 🍑
body:
You could meet the next chair of the DNC! **Pitch in $3 or more right now, and you'll be automatically entered for a chance to meet the next Chair of the DNC in Atlanta this weekend!

No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win. Contributing will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by 2/22/17. [Enter by contributing here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c542/4067b0a/2c96b9137/7e7d3dd2/1441832653/VEsHBg/ "http://my.democrats.org/meet-the-next-dnc-chair?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+Enter+by+contributing+here&utm_campaign=em_20170221_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170221_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170221_dnc2_nd"), or click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c542/4067b0a/2c96b9137/7e7d3dd3/1441832653/VEsHAQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/next-chair-contest-signup?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170221_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170221_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170221_dnc2_nd") to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Atlanta, GA; two (2) nights' hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; the opportunity for winner and winner's guest to attend portions of the DNC Winter Meeting on 2/24-25/17 (approximate retail value of all prizes $3,500). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c542/4067b0a/2c96b9137/7e7d3dd0/1441832653/VEsHAA/ "http://my.democrats.org/next-chair-contest-rules?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+Official+Rules&utm_campaign=em_20170221_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170221_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170221_dnc2_nd") and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003.

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c542/4067b0a/2c96b9137/7e7d3dd1/1441832653/VEsHAw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=16+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170221_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170221_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170221_dnc2_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c542/4067b0a/2c96b9137/7e7d3dde/1441832653/VEsHAg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=17+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170221_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170221_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170221_dnc2_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c542/4067b0a/2c96b9137/7e7d3ddf/1441832653/VEsHDQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=18+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170221_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170221_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170221_dnc2_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c542/4067b0a/2c96b9137/7e7d3ddc/1441832653/VEsHDA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=19+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170221_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170221_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170221_dnc2_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
